title: Mirrored Columns in My Work customized view
excerpt:
It would be really helpful if mirrored columns were able to be pulled into the “My Work” view.

posts.author: lcohen (Lauren Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really helpful if mirrored columns were able to be pulled into the “My Work” view.

E.G. we pull the status of tickets into sub-boards based on department working on it. These sub-boards are where people are assigned to complete the ticket, and these sub-boards are what are filtered to display on our My Work. However, it doesn’t allow us to use the mirrored “Status” column from the main board.

Screen Shot 2022-05-18 at 1.23.32 PM1766×680 96.9 KB

posts.author: katrinavarlam (Katrina)
posts.cookedHtml: Just wanted to add here our team’s work scenario. We use project boards in which we specify time allocated to each task. It would be super useful if the column with the hours could be mirrored into “My work” — so that besides seeing the task, you could also see how many hours you’re supposed to work on it.

posts.author: daniel.jarolim (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: plus 1 vote here. Our team is mirroring practically all custom fields that are not supported in “My Work” customization. Can you add Mirrored Timeline and Mirrored date and also formula field formatted to date time?
